title: Doflamingo Announces the Birdcage
description: Pages 1–5 focus on doflamingo announces the birdcage, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo announces the rules of his Birdcage game, putting prices on the heads of Luffy, Law, Riku, and the allies who threaten him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nobody will come to save you...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: and nobody can escape from this "Birdcage"!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Communication with the outside world is impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The second is to be

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: unbetweenst to the world at large, you will die here alone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your crazed fellows will continue to harm those around them without dis- function or remorse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dad, stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: be it their own families...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Some-body stop me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or their best friends ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Or the citizens they have sworn to protect ......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get away from me, all of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ughh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: URGHH ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ISSHOU- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: pant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: NGUOHHHHHHH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: No matter how you try to run or hide...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Shamehooe, you may

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: There is no safe haven to be found within this cage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The terror of the birdcage will continue for as many days as need be!! It is only a question of which comes first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: the death of everyone on this island, or the full- Filment of my condi- Tions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Who knows what that Doflamingo bastard is planning...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The factory just rose out of the ground and went off somewhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Is this even possible?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But one thing is for sure- this is our chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's time to get out of this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We are finally free from our under-ground prison!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thank you, God usopp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: What was all that fuss just now, Kinemon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Ah, well, I was in disguise and some people came after my life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: A... an iron chest- band?! this foreign culture... I like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ah! Wicca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: R...Robin- Senpai, I wanna be your SLA... I mean, I wanna ask you some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: th....that guy's nose looks just like that of the famed "sogeking-senpa!" who shot down the flag at the tower of justice, but could it be...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Yes, that's him. His real name is USOPP.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: OHHH, man!!! The man who fired the shot that made an enemy of the whole world, and the woman in whose fragile heart that shot found its mark!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: It's the Enies Lobby Shot of Justice Duo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The hell are you getting all worked up about, you fanatic?! Give it a rest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: This is the man who made short work of my arm...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: I am glad I was able to reunite you with your comrades.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Though small, your people are true war- riors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Thanks, topknot- land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We found them Col- lapsed in a Palace corridor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: They must have risked their lives for the captain!! KABU-SAN!! Rampo!! We're so proud of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Cry out!! Embrace your hatred!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: AAA- HHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: You are all mere "victims"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: STOO- OP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: ...It's like we've gone back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: This is that night ten years ago all over again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I finally see the truth!! That night, King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: The Riku Royal Army...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: They were all being control- led...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: ...by Dofla- Mingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: ...stop this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo ....!!!

summary: Doflamingo Announces the Birdcage develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
